description: This API routine is the second release of the dynamic simulation initialization function. Use this API routine to initialize a PSSE dynamic simulation for state-space simulations (i.e., in preparation for activity RUN) and to specify the channel output file into which the output channel values are to be recorded during the dynamic simulation. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.9.0 and 34.2.0. ierr = strt_2(options, outfile)

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying simulation initialization options. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: outfile
parameters.description: Channel output file (blank to bypass recording of the output channel values in a channel output file). (input; blank by default).

options.description: bypass printing of the network solution convergence monitor.
print the network solution convergence monitor.

error_codes.description: prior initialization modified the loads - pick up original converted case.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
